creator: dam@my.gd
text:
A shell escape vulnerability was found in lshell [1].

This vulnerability is confirmed in lshell's current version 0.9.16_2 in the FreeBSD ports tree and can be exploited like so :

lshell$ echo () sh && echo
#
^--- hey look, I'm in /bin/sh now


This PR aims to have shells/lshell 0.9.16_2 tagged as vulnerable.

I shall submit a new PR to bring lshell up to the upstream's version 0.9.18 which corrects the issue.



[1] https://github.com/ghantoos/lshell/issues/151
